title: Plug Power Turnaround: Q4 2025 Shows Positive Margins, Cost Savings
text: Plug Power achieved a positive gross margin of 2.4% in Q4 2025, a significant improvement from the negative 122.5% in Q4 2024. The company achieved a 125-percentage-point gross margin improvement year-over-year, reaching positive territory in Q4 2025. This turnaround reflects Project Quantum Leap's effectiveness in reducing operational costs and improving efficiency across the business. Q4 2025 revenue reached $225 million, surpassing analyst forecasts and demonstrating the company's ability to drive top-line growth. The adjusted EPS for Q4 2025 was negative $0.06 versus adjusted EPS of negative $0.29 for Q4 2024, showing significant improvement in the bottom line. The company's hydrogen production network exceeded 40 tons-per-day in 2025, with operations in Georgia, Tennessee, and Louisiana. Plug Power shipped more than 185 MW of GenEco electrolyzers in 2025, representing 203% year-over-year growth.
